title: Teltonika RUT206, Industrial 4G Wi-Fi 4 router
description: The Teltonika RUT206 is an industrial 4G LTE Wi-Fi 4 router with (2) 10/100Mbps ports (LAN + configurable LAN/WAN), (2) SMA female connectors for external LTE antennas, (1) RP-SMA female connector for an external Wi-Fi antenna, (1) RS232/RS485 serial interface and (2) mini SIM slots The router is equipped with a modem supporting 4G LTE Cat. 4, 3G and 2G , with data rates of up to 150Mbps downlink and 50Mbps uplink . Power can be supplied via the 2-pin DC connector (9-57 V), active 802.3af PoE (9-57 V) or passive PoE (16-57 V) on the LAN port Device 2-pin terminal block 2x3-pin connector Hex key SIM adapter kit
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LTE, 2.4 GHz, 2G (GSM), 3G (GSM) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g 2.4GHz MIMO 1 x 1 SISO Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 3 Roaming Yes Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (38) 2600 MHz, (40) 2300 MHz,… Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) SMA female + (1) RP-SMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps + (1) 10/100Mbps LAN/WAN Serial port RS-232, RS-485 SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 16 .. 57V DC, 9 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC terminal PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 3,5 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop, DIN rail Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 132 Width [mm] 83 Height [mm] 83 Depth [mm] 25 Hardware CPU Mediatek, 580 Mhz, MIPS 24KEc CPU frequency [MHz] 580 Internal storage [MB] 32 RAM [MB] 128
